parameters.name: AuthnSignAlgo
parameters.description:
The signature algorithm supported by the Alibaba Cloud service provider (SP). Valid values:

- rsa-sha256

- rsa-sha1

parameters.name: NewDescription
parameters.description:
The new description.

> Specify at least one of the `NewDescription` and `NewEncodedSAMLMetadataDocument` parameters.

parameters.name: NewEncodedSAMLMetadataDocument
parameters.description:
The new metadata file.

> Specify at least one of the `NewDescription` and `NewEncodedSAMLMetadataDocument` parameters.

parameters.name: SAMLProviderName
parameters.description: The name of the identity provider to modify.
